title: moluno #3435
definition:
1) to pollute, stain, contaminate, defile
    1a) used in NT of those who have not kept themselves pure from the
        defilements of sin, who have soiled themselves by fornication
        and adultery

 Sinonim   : Lihat Definisi \\5864\\
                        dan \\5910\\
